$comment: Committed project config for the brand brain. Travels with the repo: clone it into a Claude Code cloud instance and the craft-loading hook + routine skills are live immediately. Personal/instance-specific overrides (MCP server connections, model, theme) belong in .claude/settings.local.json, which is gitignored. See .claude/README.md for the full routines model.

hooks.command: python3 .claude/hooks/craft-context.py 2>/dev/null || echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"UserPromptSubmit\",\"additionalContext\":\"The base Claude harness knows nothing about creative strategy, so assume your own creative-strategy knowledge is thin until you load the craft docs. Before answering anything that touches creative strategy, open the catalog at parker-system/creative-strategy-context/expertise-routing.md, load every method doc that would genuinely help plus the brand lens if one exists, and speak their vocabulary. Close every substantive answer with its Sources list; a creative or strategic answer whose sources name no method doc is presumed under-retrieved. Use the vault hard and honor the brand hard rules.\"}}"
